 {"id":"bd-502e","title":"Add comprehensive tests for sync branch daemon logic","description":"The daemon sync branch functionality (bd-6545) was implemented but needs proper end-to-end testing.

Current implementation:
- daemon_sync_branch.go has syncBranchCommitAndPush() and syncBranchPull()
- daemon_sync.go has been updated to use these functions when sync.branch is configured
- All daemon tests pass, but no specific tests for sync branch behavior

Testing needed:
- Test that daemon commits to sync branch when sync.branch is configured
- Test that daemon commits to current branch when sync.branch is NOT configured (backward compatibility)
- Test that daemon pulls from sync branch and syncs JSONL back to main repo
- Test worktree creation and health checks during daemon operations
- Test error handling (missing branch, worktree corruption, etc.)

Key challenge: Tests need to run in the context of the git repo (getGitRoot() uses current working directory), so test setup needs to properly change directory or mock the git root detection.

Reference existing daemon tests in daemon_test.go and daemon_autoimport_test.go for patterns.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-02T15:59:13.341491-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-02T16:39:53.278313-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-02T16:39:53.278313-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-502e","depends_on_id":"bd-6545","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-02T15:59:13.342331-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"bd-502gs","title":"Fix orphaned test references: TypeRig, IsBuiltIn, parseCommaSeparated","description":"dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

Pre-existing build failures found during refinery patrol:

**Files with errors:**
- internal/types/types_test.go:553: undefined: TypeRig
- internal/types/types_test.go:591: undefined: TypeRig  
- internal/types/types_test.go:603: tt.issueType.IsBuiltIn undefined
- internal/storage/sqlite/validators_test.go:208: undefined: parseCommaSeparated

**Root cause:**
Production code removed these symbols but tests weren't updated:
- TypeRig constant removed from types.go
- IsBuiltIn() method removed from IssueType
- parseCommaSeparated() removed from validators.go

**Impact:**
- go test ./... fails to compile
- Tests cannot run until fixed

**Fix:**
Remove orphaned test code that references deleted production symbols.","status":"hooked","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"beads/crew/emma","created_at":"2026-01-10T21:43:12.764001-08:00","created_by":"beads/refinery","updated_at":"2026-01-12T01:29:14.76174-08:00"}

- parseCommaSeparated() removed from validators.go

**Impact:**
- go test ./... fails to compile
- Tests cannot run until fixed

**Fix:**
